{{Infobox character
| name = Sel’miroth
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| titles = one of the Seven Calamities, great D’Niss, lone survivor of the Seven Calamities
| abilities = spellcaster, hypnotist
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sel’miroth was a prominent member of the [[D’Niss]] and one of the [[Seven Calamities]], though she was noted as being the smallest among that group. A powerful psychic and hypnotist, she considered herself a primary follower of [[Esh’kinaar]] due to the nuanced nature of her mental talents. She commanded a massive swarm of soldiers and utilized weapons made of condensed [[Aether]] that traveled through space at near-light speeds. During her final conflict, she was targeted by a high-level [[Aethertech]] device known as [[Worldslayer]]. Despite being wounded, she attempted to maintain an intense spell and ultimately died in a state of triumph upon the arrival of her mother.}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|As a great [[D’Niss]] and one of the [[Seven Calamities]], Sel’miroth functioned as a subtle hypnotist and spellcaster. During the conflict, the entity was targeted by [[Sola]], who utilized the [[Worldslayer]] beam to pierce its form. Although Sel’miroth was a system subject to a [[Subspace]] blockade, it eventually became the lone survivor of the [[Seven Calamities]]. The entity's [[life]] ended when the [[World Spirit of Visiria]] killed it, leaving behind only shredded rainbow wings.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Sel’miroth]] is one of the [[Seven Calamities]] and a great [[D’Niss]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c16">''The Knight'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Sel’miroth]] is a character who can be pierced by the [[Worldslayer]] beam.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Sel’miroth]] was shot by [[Sola]] with [[Worldslayer]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c17">''The Knight'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Sel’miroth]] is a system subject to a [[Subspace]] blockade.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c19">''The Knight'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Sel’miroth]] is a subtle spellcaster and hypnotist.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c39">''The Knight'', chapter 39</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Sel’miroth]] is the lone survivor of the [[Seven Calamities]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c40">''The Knight'', chapter 40</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Sel’miroth]] has shredded rainbow wings and was killed by the [[World Spirit of Visiria]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c40" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“Sola shot Sel’miroth with Worldslayer.”<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
